name: My employer denied my work fall claim, now what?

mainEntity.name: My employer denied my work fall claim, now what?

acceptedAnswer.text: Object within 20 days (UT)/60 (ID), request hearing with attorney help.
acceptedAnswer.description: File an objection with Utah Labor Commission within 20 days of denial notice to request hearing; Idaho has 60 days for Commission application. Appeals can lead to full benefits[4]. Key factors: Gather more evidence like expert medical opinions; attorney handles hearings. Deadlines strict—don't delay. Many denials overturned with proper advocacy.

description: Object within 20 days (UT)/60 (ID), request hearing with attorney help.
